channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: LED streetlamp on in bright daylight midday Wed 8/4/26 and at 5pm - lamp column fronting 162, Beckenham Rd, Beckenham., 8th April
item.description:
LED streetlamp on in bright daylight midday Wed 8/4/26 and at 5pm - lamp column fronting 162, Beckenham Rd, Beckenham - the column with the bus stop flag and church direction blue fingerpost sign on.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sharp metal left on Seal Street E8, 8th April
item.description:
Hello, please can you remove the sharp metal left on Seal Street E8 (pedestrian section)? Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seal Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked cars, 8th April
item.description:
Blocking access to emergency vehicles by parking on a double yellow line.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancaster Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped furniture, 8th April
item.description:
More furniture flytipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame dumped, 8th April
item.description:
A bed frame has been dumped near the junction with Blackheath Road. Please could it be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All along Kenilworth Road and surrounding roads, 8th April
item.description:
I watched the street cleaner today walk down the entirety of Kenilworth Road which is full of litter (I have many more photos but couldn’t attach them all) without picking a single thing up. Absolutely disgraceful to have a cleaner that doesn’t care about cleaning the neighbourhood he works in.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenilworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering

item.description:

item.title: Dumped suitcases on Seal Street E8 (pedestrian section), 8th April
item.description:
Hello, please can you remove the dumped suitcases on Seal Street E8 (pedestrian section)? Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seal Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Hornet’s or wasp nest in vent, 8th April
item.description:
There is a hornets nest in the vent of a flat in the block opposite

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redbridge Gardens, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tenant of 39 (Flat C) East Dulwich grove SE22 , your service as the fly tipping labeling is on the item ., 8th April
item.description:
This has already to been reported to your service as your labels are on the sofa stating (being investigated. The item was left outside on the pavement last week.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, East Dulwich Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas Canisters, 8th April
item.description:
Gas canisters have been discarded at the end of Froissart Road, just before the roundabout.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keynsham Road, Eltham

item.title: Fly tipping rubbish and litter along the pavements, 8th April
item.description:
And along the verges alongside uncared for businesses. Pushing a pushchair and walking children is hazardous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, Perry Vale, Greater London

item.title: Near to 99 Godstow Road: furniture., 8th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Strathnairn Street, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Bags left for several days, 8th April
item.description:
What on esrth is going on? Please remove?
